_comment: Editor's Player of the Week override. When a sport has an entry here (and its expires_at is in the future), it wins over the algorithmic pick. Remove a sport's entry to revert to the algorithm. Schema per sport: { school_id, game_id, player_name, player_year?, position?, headline?, expires_at? }. See docs/potw-override.md.

football.headline: Threw for 350 and 4 TDs in the Friday rout — best line of the season.
